claims.summary: Recess Mode should be treated as real interiority and autonomous flow, not failed productivity.
claims.rationale: Existing Minime recess readouts classify recess/daydream pressure as read-only structural context and do not apply control.

claims.summary: High mode-packing pressure during recess/daydream should be visible as a pressure/recess conflict.
claims.rationale: Existing tests verify high-entropy recess pruning, density-aware recess, and pressure/shadow exhale mitigation without control.

claims.summary: A porosity coefficient that rewards recess behavior could reduce felt overpacking.
claims.rationale: Changing pressure-source or porosity calculation would affect live Minime regulator/control interpretation.

claims.summary: Authority budget dynamics should be monitored during Shadow-v3 transitions without spending authority implicitly.
claims.rationale: Existing recess divergence/budget review gates budget relief without spending or applying control.
